inputs.label: Total Cholesterol
inputs.businessContext: Total cholesterol level measured in mg/dL.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cholesterol level measured in mg/dL.
businessContext_i18n.tr: mg/dL cinsinden ölçülen toplam kolesterol seviyesi.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de cholestérol total mesuré en mg/dL.
businessContext_i18n.es: Nivel de colesterol total medido en mg/dL.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Cholestérol à lipoprotéines de haute densité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Colesterol de lipoproteínas de alta densidad.

inputs.label: Triglycerides
inputs.businessContext: Triglyceride level; Friedewald formula valid if <400 mg/dL.

businessContext_i18n.en: Triglyceride level; Friedewald formula valid if <400 mg/dL.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Trigliserit seviyesi; Friedewald formülü <400 mg/dL ise geçerlidir.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de triglycérides ; la formule de Friedewald est valide si < 400 mg/dL.
businessContext_i18n.es: Nivel de triglicéridos; la fórmula de Friedewald es válida si <400 mg/dL.

inputs.label: Age
inputs.businessContext: Patient age in years (used for reference, not in calculation).

businessContext_i18n.en: Patient age in years (used for reference, not in calculation).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıl cinsinden hasta yaşı (hesaplamada değil, referans için kullanılır).
businessContext_i18n.de: Patientenalter in Jahren (dient als Referenz, nicht in der Berechnung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge du patient en années (utilisé comme référence, pas dans le calcul).
businessContext_i18n.es: Edad del paciente en años (usada como referencia, no en el cálculo).
